title: MAJOR ORDER
briefing: Complete the required number of Operations on Omicron in order to quell Terminid resistance and enable E-711 extraction, to enable synthesis of Dark Fluid.

title: STRATEGIC THREAT
briefing: Hold Crimsica in order to restore the fuel lines of Managed Democracy, and end the temporary fleetwide rationing of E-710.

title: STRATEGIC OPPORTUNITY
briefing: Kill the required number of Dragon Roaches in order to prevent the fuel crisis and resulting supply shortages from worsening.
